name: Double Chocolate Mint Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 1 10-ounce bag of Nestles Toll House Mint-Chocolate Chips divided in half for this recipe.
2. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
3. Melt 3/4 cup of mint-chocolate chips over hot (not boiling) water; stir until smooth. Remove from heat and cool to room temperature.
4. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
5. In a large bowl, beat butter, brown sugar, granulated sugar, and vanilla extract until creamy.
6. Add melted chips and egg; beat well.
7. Gradually blend in the flour mixture.
8. Stir in remaining 3/4 cup of mint-chocolate chips and nuts.
9. Drop by rounded tablespoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
10. Bake at 375 degrees F for 8 to 10 minutes.
11. Allow cookies to stand 2 to 3 minutes, then remove from cookie sheets.
12. Cool completely on wire racks.
